scope: Pass B full-surface expansion (Tier-2 hook-migrated): 3 read streams, all distinct JSON-RPC 'method' values POSTed to the SAME single /v4 endpoint -- the 2 legacy-parity streams (domain_keywords via SerpstatDomainProcedure.getKeywords, domain_competitors via SerpstatDomainProcedure.getCompetitors) plus 1 new stream (domain_urls via SerpstatDomainProcedure.getDomainUrls, the only other domain-level method sharing the identical {domain, se, page, size} params/in-body-pagination shape hooks/serpstat/hooks.go's StreamHook already implements). Excluded: every other documented SerpstatDomainProcedure/SerpstatKeywordProcedure/SerpstatBacklinksProcedure/SerpstatRankTrackerProcedure/SerpstatSiteAuditProcedure method -- each takes a materially different params shape (a caller-supplied domains/keywords ARRAY rather than a single domain+page+size, or an entirely different per-project/per-check resource model for rank-tracker/site-audit) that the existing StreamHook's single param-shape loop cannot serve without a second, differently-shaped request builder; extending the hook to a 2nd request shape was judged out of proportion to this pass's scope (the ~300-line Tier-2 soft-cap guidance is about SHAPE complexity, not just line count -- see docs.md Known limits). Every covered/excluded entry below is declared method GET (not the literal wire HTTP verb, which is always POST for this JSON-RPC transport) to correctly signal READ semantics to connectorgen validate's capabilities.write/read cross-check (design SS E.1 rule 4); Serpstat has no write/mutation JSON-RPC method anywhere in its documented surface.

excluded.reason: takes a caller-supplied domains ARRAY param (multi-domain batch lookup), not the single-domain+page+size shape hooks/serpstat/hooks.go's StreamHook loop implements; would require a 2nd, differently-shaped request builder
historical time-series of a domain's keyword count/visibility, not a page-number-paginated record list; incompatible params/response shape
keyword-centric top-pages-by-traffic report; a materially different params shape (keyword-driven, not domain+page+size) from domain_urls
market-category-scoped domain ranking, not a per-configured-domain query; a different config surface (category id, not domain) entirely
paid-search (PPC) competitor variant of the already-covered organic domain_competitors stream; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
referring/backlink-source domain list; belongs to the excluded backlinks surface, not the domain-analysis surface this pass covers
outbound-link-target domain list; belongs to the excluded backlinks surface

keyword-centric organic-ranking-domains report; despite the similar method name this is keyword-driven (not domain-driven) and would need a keyword config surface distinct from domain_keywords' domain config
takes a caller-supplied keywords ARRAY param, not the single-domain+page+size shape this hook's loop implements
single-keyword semantic-expansion report; a keyword-driven config surface distinct from this pass's domain-driven streams
entire backlinks product surface out of scope this pass; different resource model (link-graph edges, not domain/keyword rows)
entire rank-tracker product surface out of scope this pass; project/tracked-keyword resource model requires its own project_id config surface
entire site-audit product surface out of scope this pass; crawl-report resource model requires its own audit-job config surface
